seoTitle: Clovelly Park vs Cobdogla — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Clovelly Park and Cobdogla. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Clovelly Park vs Cobdogla: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Clovelly Park and Cobdogla.
heading: Clovelly Park vs Cobdogla — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Clovelly Park, South Australia and Cobdogla, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Clovelly Park has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Cobdogla (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Clovelly Park or Cobdogla safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Clovelly Park has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Cobdogla scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Clovelly Park scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Cobdogla scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Clovelly Park or Cobdogla?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Clovelly Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.18% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
